King Tormax's Head  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 4.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
King Tormax's Head
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 4.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Head of the Kromzek King
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Agamenoar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-18 17:28:22
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
King Tormax
The Fabled King Tormax

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Icewell Keep
Quest Name
Tormax's Head - Dwarves

Skyshrine
Quest Name
Tormax's Head - Dragons

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel


Uploaded July 1st, 2023 by Craigy
Updated July 2nd, 2023

faction hits
QuoteReply
# May 04 2014 at 1:58 PM Rating: Good
Shuraz
Sage
1,086 posts
When you hand in the head to yelinak you get +50 faction to claws of veeshan
▲ Page top
Reward
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2007 at 8:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248689436
1 post
On turning in the head.

Dain Frostreaver IV says "You have done what no Coldain could do. Onstill! This is indeed a glorious say in our people's history. In return for your invaluable service I present you with the Tri-plated Golden Hackle Hammer. Its magic is powerful and I am sure it will serve you well."

Dain Frostreaver IV shouts "Let it be know from this day forth that Onstill and their companions are Heros of the Coldain Kingdom. King Tormax has been slain, it is a time for celebration. Let no tankard go unfilled!"

Your faction standing with Dain Frostreaver IV got better.
Your faction standing with Coldain got better.
Your faction standing with King Tormax could not get any worse.
▲ Page top
also
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2006 at 6:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591836045554
17 posts
If you turn his head into the Dain, he gives you the tri-platinum hackle hammer. I couldn't find info on what would happen, so I did the turn in, that is what happened. Unfortunately, I'm a ber, so I can't click it.

Edited, Sep 19th 2006 at 10:23pm EDT by Bryar
▲ Page top
also
QuoteReply
# May 07 2007 at 6:21 AM Rating: Decent
Baatorian
101 posts
This is CONFIRMED.
Turned head in to Dain with Warmly Dain faction and recieved the hammer.
Nice Shielding clickie
▲ Page top

6,998 posts
Baatorian wrote:
This is CONFIRMED.
Turned head in to Dain with Warmly Dain faction and recieved the hammer.
Nice Shielding clickie


If either of you have logs and/or screenshots from this, particularly including dialogs and faction hits, please send them in to eqteam@allakhazam.com.

oops
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2004 at 2:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801434380
22 posts
Oops, i forgot to mention this.....After turning in the head, I received a sword from him...I then said 2nd script and turned in the sword for the exp, fasction hit, and the boots.
▲ Page top
turn-in for boots
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2004 at 2:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801434380
22 posts
I just turned in this head to Lord Yelinak tonight...I am Yalar, a 65 Enchanter on Veeshan...He conned apprehensive to me, then I casted collaboration on him....Then he conned amiable.....I hailed him again, he talked to me finally.....i said the first script, then turned in the head....then I said 2nd script, and he gave me faction hit for him, experience, and the white dragonscale boots.....Just thought I'd give ya all this info....grats me!
▲ Page top
look at it
QuoteReply

30 posts
is king tormax a really tall outcast barbarian in a big gold suit of armor? lol
